title: mentha longifolia var. noeana
intro: Mentha longifolia var. noeana, also known as Bergamot Mint, is a subspecies of the mint plant that is native to the Mediterranean region and is characterized by its distinctive citrusy aroma and flavor. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Bergamot Mint include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve respiratory health, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Bergamot Mint can be prepared as a tea, essential oil, or tincture, and is often used in aromatherapy and traditional medicine to promote relaxation and well-being.
